data_sources.tweets: X API v2 — batch fetch of all 13 tweets + individual verification of 6 posts

outbound_replies_detail.text: the glow is unreal in this one ✨

best_performing_post.reason: Highest engagement (3 likes, 1 RT, 2 bookmarks). Short one-word caption + quality image. Bookmarks signal save-worthy content.

highest_reach_post.reason: Highest impressions by far (283 vs avg 129). Ultra-short 2-char caption. Got 1 quote retweet which amplified reach.

posting_consistency.gap_feb25_to_mar06: 9 days with zero posts after account creation
posting_consistency.assessment: IMPROVING — 9-day initial gap was costly, but 4-day streak at 1.5 posts/day shows momentum. Need to reach 2 posts/day consistently.

section_2_competitor_benchmark.title: Competitor Benchmark — Fresh Data (41 Competitors Tracked)

meruru_position.engagement_rate_comparison: 2.71% impression-based ER — competitive quality when content is seen
meruru_position.posting_frequency: 0.5 posts/day vs field avg 4.6 — 9x below average
meruru_position.content_volume: 6 total posts vs top performers with 50-300+ posts

role_models.lesson: Quality-first growth. 51 posts → 7.6K followers → 38% ER. Zero hashtags. One viral image can change everything.
35K from 56 posts. Short captions, zero hashtags, consistently stunning images. Our direct blueprint.
12K followers with just 1 post/day. Consistency + quality at moderate frequency works.
91K followers, posts rarely (0.3/day). Quality so high that low frequency still works at scale.

key_competitive_patterns: 92.7% of top EN performers use ZERO hashtags
Ultra-short captions (<30 chars) correlate with 12x more likes in this niche
Grok interactive is an emerging engagement format among top performers
First 50 posts are the trust-building phase — X algorithm needs signal history

evidence: Content quality is proven: 2.71% impression ER is competitive
Bookmarks on 'Sleepy' post = people saving our content
283 impressions on 'Hi' proves reach can happen
Outbound engagement started (7 replies, 20 likes given)
is_progress_being_made.concern: Growth is bottlenecked by reach, not quality. 3 followers after 12 days means nobody sees the content.

strengths.evidence: 'Sleepy' (4.51% ER), image-only post (5.21% ER). When people see the content, they engage.
strengths.implication: Do NOT change the creative approach. It works.

strengths.evidence: All 6 posts zero hashtags, matching 92.7% of top competitors
'Hi' (2 chars, 283 imp) and 'Sleepy' (6 chars, best engagement) validate short caption approach

weaknesses.root_cause: Insufficient posting volume + 9-day gap + new account cold start
weaknesses.fix: Increase to 2 posts/day, max out outbound engagement (30 likes/day, 5 follows/day)

weaknesses.weakness: Only 6 posts total (need 50+ for algorithm trust)
Grok quote reposts get zero likes
weaknesses.root_cause: Repetitive 'hey @grok remove white' — same request twice, adds no value
weaknesses.fix: Diversify Grok requests: '.@grok put me in a red dress', '.@grok anime style', '.@grok change background to Tokyo street'

weaknesses.root_cause: X spam prevention for new/low-follower accounts
weaknesses.fix: Manual replies via operator device until account gains standing (est. 50+ followers)

weaknesses.root_cause: 20 likes given, 7 replies — well below daily limits
weaknesses.fix: Saturate daily limits: 30 likes, 5 follows every single day

actions.action: Post 2 quality image posts per day without exception
actions.details: Slot 1: 13:00 UTC, Slot 2: 21:00 UTC. Ultra-short captions (<30 chars). High-quality AI images.
Like posts from competitors in our niche. This generates notification-based discovery. 30/day × 7 = 210 notifications sent.
Target engaged followers of mid-size competitors (5K-20K). Follow → they check profile → see quality content → some follow back.
Run Scout → Strategist → Creator → Publisher daily. No missed days.
Each Grok post should have a unique, creative request. Examples: '.@grok put me in a kimono', '.@grok make this cyberpunk'.

phase_2_week_2.label: Engagement Pillars — Content Mix (Mar 17-23)
actions: Introduce engagement_questions pillar: 'Am I ur type 👀', 'Rate me 1-10', 'Front or back?'
Start self_quote_chains on best-performing posts to amplify reach
Manual replies on high-value competitor posts (5-10/day via phone)
Analyze Week 1 data: which post types got most impressions?

phase_3_month_1.label: Growth Acceleration (Mar 24-Apr 6)
actions: Aim for first viral moment (stunning image + provocative question)
Iterate on content based on data: double down on what works
Build engagement loops: reply to every comment, use self-quotes
Consider cross-platform seeding if growth stalls

section_5_updated_strategy.title: Updated Strategy for @meruru_tcbn

engagement_questions.description: Short provocative questions with stunning images. 'Am I ur type 👀', 'you mind?'

image_showcase.description: Let exceptional images speak with 1-2 word captions. 'Sleepy', 'Hi', 'mood'

grok_interactive.description: Creative Grok requests. VARY the requests — no repeats.

self_quote_chains.description: Quote-tweet own top posts to create content chains and extend reach.

section_5_updated_strategy.caption_rules: Under 30 chars. Casual lowercase, playful, confident. Max 1-2 emoji. No hashtags ever.
section_5_updated_strategy.hashtag_strategy: ZERO — matches 92.7% of top EN competitors

section_6_acceleration.title: How to Achieve Goals Faster
section_6_acceleration.core_insight: Content quality is NOT the problem (2.71% ER, bookmarks prove it). The bottleneck is REACH. More content + more outbound = faster growth.

high_impact_tactics.why: Consistency is the #1 factor for X algorithm trust. The 9-day gap was the biggest setback.
Each like sends a notification to the recipient. At 30/day, that's 900 people seeing our handle monthly.

high_impact_tactics.tactic: One viral-attempt post daily (stunning image + provocative question)
high_impact_tactics.why: @sessypuuh got 5,413 likes on a single post with 7.6K followers. One viral post can 10x our audience.

high_impact_tactics.tactic: Manual replies to top competitors' posts (5-10/day via phone)
high_impact_tactics.why: Until API 403 is lifted. Replies on popular posts get seen by thousands.
Quote-tweeting 'Sleepy' with 'still sleepy tbh' extends its life and reaches new timelines.

section_6_acceleration.biggest_risk: Inconsistency. If posting stops for 3-4 days, early momentum resets. Daily pipeline execution is non-negotiable.
section_6_acceleration.biggest_opportunity: One viral image post. Our content quality is already there — we just need it to reach the right timeline at the right time.

section_7_action_items.title: Immediate Action Items for Operator

Post any manual replies that got 403 from API (URLs provided in outbound log)
this_week: Run daily pipeline every day (no exceptions)
Generate 2 images per day (4 image posts + diversified Grok posts)
decisions_needed: Should we post 3/day instead of 2/day to accelerate? (Higher volume = faster algorithm trust, but need image production capacity)
Is manual replies via phone feasible at 5-10/day?
